h1.visual_description: Centered, all-caps, small-caps style, preceded by 'CHAPTER' and a number, underlined by a horizontal rule.

h2.visual_description: Centered, large serif font, title case, significant vertical whitespace above and below.

h3.visual_description: Centered, medium serif font, title case, no horizontal rule.

visual_matchers.pattern: Large initial drop cap spanning approximately 4 lines of text.
First line of a section following a drop cap is in small-caps.
Text enclosed in square brackets containing alphanumeric codes (e.g., [CAC 002 R022]).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Centered Arabic numerals at the bottom of the page (footer) representing page numbers.
